title: Hugo's Four Seasons at School
synopsis: Hugo discovers the beauty of nature's changing seasons through his school year, watching trees, flowers, and weather transform outside his classroom window.

pages.text: Hugo loves looking out his classroom window. He has straight light blonde hair and bright blue eyes that sparkle when he sees something exciting. Today is his first day of school in spring!

illustration.description: A cheerful classroom scene with Hugo, a boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes, sitting at a small desk near a large window. Outside the window, spring flowers bloom in soft pastel colors - pink cherry blossoms, yellow daffodils, and fresh green grass. Sunlight streams through the window in gentle, warm tones.
illustration.alt: Hugo sitting in classroom looking out window at spring flowers

pages.text: Outside the window, Hugo sees tiny green buds on the tree branches. Pink and white flowers bloom everywhere. The grass is so green and new! Hugo watches a yellow butterfly dance from flower to flower.

illustration.description: The same classroom window view with Hugo, who has straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes, pointing excitedly at the window. The scene outside shows the tree with small green buds, delicate spring blossoms in soft pastels, and a bright yellow butterfly fluttering among pink and white flowers in the school garden.
illustration.alt: Hugo pointing at spring tree buds and butterfly outside classroom window

pages.text: Now it's summer! Hugo wears a bright yellow shirt to school. The tree outside has big, full green leaves that make cool shade. Hugo sees red strawberries growing in the school garden.

illustration.description: The same classroom scene with Hugo, a boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes, wearing a bright yellow shirt and looking out the window. The view outside shows the same tree now full of lush, bright green summer leaves, vibrant flowers in bold summer colors, and red strawberries visible in the garden beds with intense, bright summer lighting.
illustration.alt: Hugo in yellow shirt looking at full summer tree and strawberry garden

pages.text: The summer sun is so bright and warm! Hugo watches his teacher water the colorful flowers. There are orange marigolds, purple petunias, and red roses. Everything grows big and strong in the summer sunshine.

illustration.description: The classroom window scene with Hugo, who has straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes, watching his teacher outside. The summer scene is vibrant with bright orange marigolds, deep purple petunias, and vivid red roses. The teacher is watering the flowers with a bright blue watering can under brilliant summer sunlight.
illustration.alt: Hugo watching teacher water bright summer flowers outside classroom

pages.text: Autumn comes to Hugo's school! The leaves on the tree change to beautiful colors. Hugo sees orange, red, and yellow leaves falling like confetti outside his classroom window.

illustration.description: The familiar classroom with Hugo, a boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes, pressing his hands against the window glass. Outside, the same tree now displays warm autumn colors - golden yellow, burnt orange, and deep red leaves, some falling gently to the ground in the warm, golden autumn light.
illustration.alt: Hugo at classroom window watching colorful autumn leaves fall from tree

pages.text: Hugo loves the crunchy sound the leaves make when children walk through them at recess. He collects pretty red and gold leaves to take home. The autumn air smells crisp and clean.

illustration.description: The same window view with Hugo, who has straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes, holding colorful autumn leaves he collected. Outside the classroom window, children can be seen playing in piles of fallen leaves under the tree, with warm autumn sunlight filtering through the remaining orange and red leaves on the branches.
illustration.alt: Hugo holding collected autumn leaves while watching children play outside

pages.text: Winter arrives at Hugo's school! Soft white snowflakes fall past the classroom window. The tree branches are bare now, but they look pretty covered in sparkly white snow.

illustration.description: The classroom scene with Hugo, a boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes, watching snowflakes fall outside the window. The same tree is now bare with dark branches outlined in white snow, and gentle snowflakes drift past the window in cool winter blues and whites with soft, diffused winter light.
illustration.alt: Hugo watching snow fall on bare tree branches outside classroom window

pages.text: Hugo has watched the tree change through all four seasons! Spring, summer, autumn, and winter each brought something special. Hugo can't wait to see what spring will bring again next year at school.

illustration.description: A magical four-panel view through the classroom window showing Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes in the center, surrounded by four views of the same tree: spring with pastel blossoms, bright summer with full green leaves, warm autumn with colorful falling leaves, and cool winter with snow-covered bare branches, representing the complete seasonal cycle.
illustration.alt: Hugo surrounded by four seasonal views of the same tree showing nature's yearly cycle

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What does Hugo see outside his classroom window in spring?
questions.explanation: In spring, Hugo sees pink and white flowers blooming and tiny green buds on the tree branches.

questions.question: What color shirt does Hugo wear in summer?
questions.explanation: Hugo wears a bright yellow shirt to school during the summer season.

questions.question: What happens to the tree leaves in autumn?
choices: They change to orange, red, and yellow colors
They get covered in white snow
questions.explanation: In autumn, the tree leaves change to beautiful warm colors like orange, red, and yellow before falling down.

questions.question: How does the tree look in winter?
choices: Bare branches covered in white snow
questions.explanation: In winter, the tree has bare branches that look pretty when they're covered in sparkly white snow.
